seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Christie Downs and Clapham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Christie Downs vs Clapham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Christie Downs and Clapham.
heading: Christie Downs vs Clapham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Christie Downs, South Australia and Clapham, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clapham has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Christie Downs (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Christie Downs or Clapham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Christie Downs has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Clapham scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Christie Downs scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Clapham scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Christie Downs or Clapham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clapham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
